feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How can we analyzing sql view execution in SAP Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We have a SQL View in Datasphere and we import the output of this SQL View to an Import Model in SAC. We have done some work on SQL View. After this work, the duration of the related job of this Import Model in SAC has increased a lot. We want to analyze this. Is there a feature similar to Plan Visualizer in Eclipse in Datasphere or Database Explorer?

entry.title: How to create Mandatory Variable at Story level in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
I have a requirement to create variables at Story level, when the user opens up/refresh the story, he/she has to see the variable prompt with Mandatory and Optional variables to enter values.

When i try to create a variable, i can see the below.

I can create variables at Model level but unable to create a Story Level.

I searched everywhere, but no luck, Could someone please help me?

entry.title: Copy widgets or pages between Stories when using aDatasphere Live Connection
entry.content:
Hello,

I've learned that it is not possible to copy widgets or pages between Stories when using a Datasphere Live Connection.     

Details in this KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/3128880 

Here is an Influence request that I have created.  

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/334757 

If this is something that you would find useful, please vote! 

Thank you

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Selected Story Filter value to displayed in the Page
entry.content:
Hi All,

We created Story Filter for one of the Dimension, I have a requirement to display the selected values of the filter to be displayed in the story at the Top Right corner dynamically, Could someone please help me on this?

Example: for the below story, i want to display as :

Selected Plant is : Plant 3 and Plant 4.

entry.title: Ratio in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I am trying to create different types of ratios in SAP SAC for CFO of a company.

Ratios are Current ratio, Acid-test ratio, Cash ratio, Debt ratio, Asset turnover ratio, Inventory turnover ratio, Receivables turnover ratio, Return on equity ratio, NPV, ROI.

How can I prepare this ratios? Which data source I need to use to prepare these ratios?

Best Regards

Md Mofty Hossain

entry.title: SAC Publications show successful but users did not receive the emails
entry.content:
Hi All,

Our SAC Publications are not being delivered to users inbox today morning. All the users are SAC recipients, and we have checked the status of all report publications, they show "successful". Anyone else had similar issues today? 

 

Thanks

Srikanth

entry.title: Story Calculations in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

Based on user given input in the variable as date, i have display 15year sales data as below

Could someone please give an idea on how can i achieve this?

entry.title: How to delete the leading zero in SAC Dimension from SAP Business Bydesign Datasource?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Hello Everyone,

I'm working on integrating sales orders from an SAP Business ByDesign data source. When refreshing the dimension, data is coming in with leading zeros, even though I set the dimension to an integer in the modeler. Unfortunately, this isn’t trimming the leading zeros as expected. I also tried a script in stories to remove them, but I’m encountering errors. Does anyone know of another way to display the values without leading zeros?

If anyone has faced a similar issue, your advice would be appreciated!

 

Regards

Janarthanan

+919884594169

meetjana@hotmail.com

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Is it truly a limitation?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I updated a public dimension with over 250,000 master data entries and a hierarchy, and it worked fine. Is the following information really accurate?

See Link: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/boc/3354605674.html 

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: Changing table cell text direction in SAC
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is it possible in SAP Analytics Cloud to have column header text in portrait orientation in the table like in the screenshot below?

Thanks in advance for your help!

Kind regards,

Kristina

entry.title: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - Copy Actual of Last uploaded month to Plan version
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement to copy the actual value of the last uploaded month and paste it in the remaining months of the plan version.

For example, if the last upload of actual data is done in Sep 2024. That value should be copied to the remaining periods i-e (Oct, Nov, DEC) of the plan version.

entry.title: Replace empty cells with Unassigned on SAC Import Jobs
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I have a simple question about a functionality SAC had with Classic Models, but now, with New Models, I can't find if it exists.

Is there any way to replace all empty cells in all columns with "#" when I'm importing a data source at the same time? or, do I have to do it once per column?

Sometimes, I have to import data sources with many columns, and I waste a lot of time replacing them. In Classic Models we were able to set an option who replaces them automatically

entry.title: Shared row axis in two tables in SAP Analytics Cloud table report
entry.content:
Hi all

we are having the following requirement from a customer.

we want to create a table report in SAP Analytics Cloud with shared row axis. On the left hand side we want to show the periodic amounts and on the right hand side the YTD amounts. In SAP BPC we could create this using the shared axis selection. Is there any relevant feature or workaround in SAC?

BR

entry.title: SAC; Measure Descirption; Dynamic Text (Variable); DataSphere Data Model
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I need to dynamically adjust the Description of measures; The Measures are Restricted Measures, created in Datasphere, they're having an offset on CALMONTH, so you can imagine something like this:
Column1: Sales, CALMONTH_offset = -1; 
Column2: Sales; CALMONTH_offset = 0;
Column3: Sales; CALMONTH_offset = +1
etc.
Is there ANY way I can somehow dynamically adjust the Description of the Restricted Measures? (DataSphere and SAC are both options). Open for wild ideas as well
SAP Datasphere SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Create Hierarchies in a automatic way SAC
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question: is it possible to create hierarchies in SAP Analytics Cloud automatically from an Excel file?

For example, I have economic codes like D01.01.01 and D01.01.01.02, and I’d like to create a parent node called D01, and similarly for D02, etc. I’m currently doing this manually, but when the file has around 4000 lines, it becomes unmanageable.

Is there a way to create these hierarchies automatically in SAP Analytics Cloud?

Thanks in advance,
GAnjos

entry.title: Is it possible to restrict a measure in SAC Story tables and Charts?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I am new to SAC, but exploring with many options.

Customer requirement to restrict few measures in a table and Graphs for specific Users 

I have controlled the dimensions for User wise using DAC But I am not able to find if we can control measures as well

Your support will help me a lot

Thanks

Sunandha

entry.title: How to Remove a measure from a chart in sac script
entry.content:
Hi @N1kh1l 

add measure is working but remove measure is not working. Even i used remove member also, but when i change the list measure is not removed form the chart

if(ListBox_1.getSelectedKey()==="PickUnits")
{
Chart_25.setVisible(false);
 
 
Chart_25.addMeasure("ELTUIDCMP7",Feed.ValueAxis);
Chart_25.addMeasure("33558012-7484-4421-3006-224195070345",Feed.ValueAxis2);
 
Chart_25.removeMember(Feed.ValueAxis,"ELTUIDCMP2");
Chart_25.removeMember(Feed.ValueAxis2,"31948283-6646-4859-3131-200104570027");
 
Chart_25.removeMember(Feed.ValueAxis,"ELTUIDCMP3");
Chart_25.removeMember(Feed.ValueAxis2,"70672825-9386-4722-8931-171337372722");
 
 
}
 
if(ListBox_1.getSelectedKey()==="PickSLots")
{
 
 
Chart_25.addMeasure("ELTUIDCMP2",Feed.ValueAxis);
Chart_25.addMeasure("31948283-6646-4859-3131-200104570027",Feed.ValueAxis2);
 
Chart_25.removeMeasure("ELTUIDCMP7",Feed.ValueAxis);
Chart_25.removeMeasure("33558012-7484-4421-3006-224195070345",Feed.ValueAxis2);
 
 
Chart_25.removeMeasure("ELTUIDCMP3",Feed.ValueAxis);
Chart_25.removeMeasure("70672825-9386-4722-8931-171337372722",Feed.ValueAxis2);
 
//console.log(Chart_25);
}
 
Regards,
Thayu.

entry.title: Is it possible to customize the table subtitle?
entry.content:
Hi colleagues,

Is it possible to customize the table subtitle in SAC stories? We've configured the number scale in the table so the subtitle is showed as "in k" but we'd like to change it to "in k tCO2e" or other terminologies which could be more clear to our users. I've attached a screenshot for your reference.

Thanks and best regards

Cham

entry.title: How to do a conditional formatting [Threshold] measure to measure in sac live Connection
entry.content:
Hi @N1kh1l 

In sac live connection threshold option for measure to measure is not available. can you please guide how to do in sac scripting on initialization

Regards,
Thayu.

entry.title: R Vizualization in SAC
entry.content:
Hi team, iam trying to use R vizulization in my stories, but i saw that i needed to activate the option on Security - administration so i could use it, but i dont have that option.

Can you help me?

Best regards,

 

Bernardo Santos
